creator_profile.name: Gary Vaynerchuk (GaryVee)
creator_profile.primary_niche: Marketing, entrepreneurship, social media strategy, personal branding

audience_size_documented.Instagram: ~11M followers (April 2026, via Instagram @garyvee and Parker Seminars speaker bio)
audience_size_documented.TikTok: ~15M followers (April 2026, via Parker Seminars speaker bio)
audience_size_documented.YouTube: ~4.15M subscribers (April 2026, per multiple speaker bios; some sources report ~3M)
audience_size_documented.X_Twitter: ~3.1M followers (April 2026, per speaker bios and social tracking)
audience_size_documented.LinkedIn: [uncertain] Not precisely documented in search results; identified as top LinkedIn influencer in 2026
audience_size_documented.cross_platform_note: Over 44-45 million combined followers across all social media platforms per official speaker bios (Parker Seminars Las Vegas 2026, NRF 2026)

creator_profile.tier_justification: One of the most recognized marketing and entrepreneurship influencers globally with 44-45M+ combined social media followers. Chairman of VaynerX (holding company encompassing VaynerMedia, Gallery Media Group, VaynerSpeakers, VaynerCommerce, and more). CEO of VaynerMedia (~$200M annual revenue). Creator and CEO of VeeFriends (NFT/entertainment brand). Early investor in Facebook, Twitter, Tumblr, Venmo, Uber, Snapchat, Coinbase with 90+ investments and 37 successful exits. Estimated net worth $200-220M. Keynote speaker at NRF 2026, Global Pioneers Summit 2026, BRIDGE Summit 2025, and other major industry events.

bot_identity.bot_name: [uncertain] No official AI chatbot product exists as of April 2026. Historical: 'First In Line' (Facebook Messenger chatbot, ~2017-2019). Unofficial third-party bots include 'GaryVeeBot' (Product Hunt, 2016), 'Ask Gary Vee' (Messenger, by Max Pelzner), and multiple fan-made GPTs in the ChatGPT GPT Store ('Gary Vee', 'Gary Vee GPT', 'Gary Vee | Marketing Advisor').
bot_identity.positioning_tagline: [uncertain] No official AI chatbot positioning exists. Gary Vaynerchuk has not launched a branded AI chatbot, custom GPT, AI clone, or digital twin product as of April 2026.
positioning_narrative_excerpts: [uncertain] No official AI chatbot marketing copy exists. Gary's AI-related public statements focus on strategy, not a personal AI product: 'AI is going to be like oxygen, with no part of our lives not going to be affected by this profound technology.'
On creator AI: 'A tidal wave of AI-driven personas will fill feeds and fight for the same attention people now enjoy.' (per GaryVee keynote content)
On adapting: 'The safest path right now is to go narrower in what you cover and more honest in who you are.' (per garyvaynerchuk.com blog on AI adaptation)
bot_identity.launch_date: N/A - No official AI chatbot product launched. Historical Messenger bot ('First In Line') launched approximately May 2019. Community.com SMS platform adopted ~2019.
bot_identity.current_status: No official AI chatbot active. Historical Messenger bot likely inactive/deprecated. Community.com SMS texting platform (non-AI) remains active at my.community.com/gary.vaynerchuk.

primary_jtbds: [uncertain] No official AI chatbot exists to define JTBDs. Based on historical Messenger bot and Community.com usage: fan_engagement - Direct communication channel with audience via SMS/messaging
[uncertain] content_distribution - Delivering new content (videos, podcasts, announcements) directly to fans via Messenger/SMS
[uncertain] community_building - VIP access and exclusive content through 'First In Line' Messenger community and Community.com
secondary_jtbds: [uncertain] lead_qualification - Community.com SMS platform captures contact information and segments audience by topic interest
[uncertain] product_promotion - Historical Messenger bot enabled purchases of Gary's products within the bot interface
jobs_to_be_done.jtbd_evidence_source: Inferred from historical Messenger bot features (per jimrowebot.com and Yuri Vaskovski Medium articles) and Community.com case study. No official AI chatbot product exists to provide direct JTBD evidence.

functionality.memory_persistence: [uncertain] Not applicable - no current AI chatbot product
functionality.upload_support: [uncertain] Not applicable - no current AI chatbot product
functionality.tool_integrations: [uncertain] Historical Messenger bot supported in-bot purchases and content playback (podcast listening within FB conversation). Community.com integrates with SMS for keyword-based topic selection.
functionality.knowledge_grounding_claimed: [uncertain] No AI knowledge grounding claimed. Historical Messenger bot provided basic FAQ responses about Gary Vaynerchuk, not AI-generated answers. Third-party GPTs in ChatGPT Store are trained on publicly available GaryVee content but are unofficial.
functionality.moderation_disclaimers: [uncertain] Not applicable - no current AI chatbot product
functionality.human_handoff: [uncertain] Historical Messenger bot was operated by Team GaryVee at VaynerMedia; Community.com SMS platform includes some human-managed responses from Gary and his team
functionality.platform_infrastructure: Historical: Facebook Messenger (First In Line chatbot, ~2017-2019, likely built on Dialogflow per Yuri Vaskovski). Current: Community.com SMS platform (non-AI). No dedicated AI chatbot infrastructure deployed.
functionality.voice_modality_details: No voice AI modality. Third-party voice cloning exists (e.g., TryParrotAI) but is not official.
functionality.ai_agent_capabilities: None. Gary Vaynerchuk has not launched an AI agent, autonomous chatbot, or AI-powered assistant product. His digital engagement tools (Messenger bot, Community.com) are rule-based or human-operated, not AI-driven.

distribution.access_url: Community.com SMS: https://my.community.com/gary.vaynerchuk (text 212-931-5731). Historical Messenger bot: Facebook Messenger (likely inactive). Unofficial GPTs: https://chatgpt.com/g/g-fSxbjCgyx-gary-vee
distribution.distribution_path_description: Social media (Instagram, YouTube, TikTok, LinkedIn, X) -> garyvaynerchuk.com or link in bio -> Community.com SMS signup (text his number) or historical Messenger bot opt-in. No AI chatbot in the funnel.
distribution.link_in_bio_platform: Custom (garyvaynerchuk.com). Instagram bio links to garyvaynerchuk.com.
distribution.social_to_bot_funnel: No AI chatbot funnel exists. Social media -> garyvaynerchuk.com -> Community.com SMS texting platform. Gary promotes his phone number (212-931-5731) across social platforms for SMS community signup. Content distribution is primarily organic social media posts across all major platforms with daily cadence.

monetization.pricing_model: N/A - No AI chatbot product to monetize. Community.com SMS platform is free for audience members (Gary is an investor in Community.com). Unofficial third-party GPTs are free to ChatGPT Plus subscribers.
monetization.bundled_with: N/A - No AI chatbot bundled with any product. Gary's revenue streams include VaynerMedia agency services, VeeFriends NFTs/collectibles, VaynerSpeakers booking, books (#AskGaryVee, Crushing It!, Jab Jab Jab Right Hook, Twelve and a Half), and investment portfolio.
monetization.list_building_integration: Community.com SMS captures phone numbers and segments audience by interest topics (keyword-based). 98% open rates and 90% engagement reported. Gary's Community has grown 37-fold from initial numbers. No AI chatbot in list-building flow.
monetization.revenue_model_detail: No AI chatbot revenue model. Primary revenue streams: VaynerMedia agency (~$200M annual revenue), VeeFriends NFT/entertainment, speaking engagements (VaynerSpeakers), investment returns (90+ investments, 37 exits including Facebook, Twitter, Uber, Coinbase), Empathy Wines (sold to Constellation Brands 2020), books and media.

content_training.content_training_corpus: [uncertain] No official AI chatbot exists, so no training corpus is defined. Unofficial third-party GPTs likely trained on publicly available content: 5 published books, 1,500+ episodes of The GaryVee Audio Experience podcast, 4,000+ YouTube videos, garyvaynerchuk.com blog posts, and extensive social media content. Gary produces 250+ pieces of content per week across platforms.
content_training.update_frequency: N/A - No AI chatbot to update. Gary's content output is daily across all platforms.

risks_guardrails.stated_disclaimers: [uncertain] No AI chatbot disclaimers exist. Unofficial third-party GPTs (GaryVeeBot, Ask Gary Vee on Messenger) explicitly state they are 'made for fun & unaffiliated with Gary.' ChatGPT Store GPTs are community-created without official endorsement.
risks_guardrails.data_use_policy_cited: [uncertain] Community.com has its own privacy policy for SMS. No AI chatbot-specific data policy exists from Gary Vaynerchuk or VaynerX.
risks_guardrails.minors_policy: [uncertain] Not documented for any Gary Vaynerchuk digital product
risks_guardrails.impersonation_safeguards: [uncertain] No official AI chatbot exists, reducing impersonation risk. However, multiple unofficial third-party bots and GPTs impersonate Gary's voice and advice style without authorization. No known enforcement actions against these unofficial bots.
risks_guardrails.regulatory_compliance_status: [uncertain] Not applicable - no AI chatbot product to regulate

competitive.competitive_moat_type: Massive organic audience (44-45M+ followers), prolific content production (250+ pieces/week), multi-platform dominance, VaynerMedia agency infrastructure, VeeFriends IP and community, early-mover status in social media marketing thought leadership. However, no AI chatbot product exists to create an AI-specific moat. Gary's strategy focuses on human authenticity and creativity as differentiators against AI-generated content rather than launching his own AI product.
competitive.meta_creator_ai_status: [uncertain] No evidence found of Gary Vaynerchuk participating in Meta's AI Studio Creator program or launching an official AI character on Instagram/Messenger/WhatsApp through Meta's tools, despite his close relationship with Meta platforms.
competitive.engagement_metrics_public: Community.com SMS: 98% open rates, 90% engagement (per Community.com case study). No AI chatbot engagement metrics exist. Social media engagement is documented across platforms but not aggregated publicly.

verification.confidence_level: high (confident that no official AI chatbot product exists as of April 2026)

research_notes.key_finding: As of April 2026, Gary Vaynerchuk has NOT launched an official AI chatbot, custom GPT, AI clone, or digital twin product. Despite being one of the most prominent voices discussing AI strategy in marketing and entrepreneurship, and despite his extensive technology investments and early adoption of platforms like Facebook Messenger bots (2017-2019) and Community.com SMS (2019-present), he has not created a consumer-facing AI product branded under his name or companies.

historical_bots.first_in_line_messenger_bot: Official Facebook Messenger chatbot launched by Team GaryVee at VaynerMedia, approximately May 2017-2019. Featured FAQ responses, in-bot purchases, content delivery, and VIP community access. Built with assistance from external developers (Yuri Vaskovski contributed Dialogflow-based AI/ML knowledge). Likely inactive/deprecated.
historical_bots.community_com_sms: Active SMS texting platform at my.community.com/gary.vaynerchuk (phone: 212-931-5731). Non-AI, keyword-based topic segmentation. Gary is an investor in Community.com. Reports 98% open rates and 90% engagement.

unofficial_third_party_bots: GaryVeeBot - Product Hunt (launched July 2016), Messenger bot, explicitly 'unaffiliated with Gary', 238 upvotes
Ask Gary Vee - Messenger chatbot by Max Pelzner, unofficial, launched on Product Hunt
Gary Vee (ChatGPT GPT Store) - chatgpt.com/g/g-fSxbjCgyx-gary-vee - community-created custom GPT
Gary Vee GPT (ChatGPT GPT Store) - chatgpt.com/g/g-l5rPl2M3J-gary-vee-gpt - community-created
Gary Vee | Marketing Advisor (ChatGPT GPT Store) - chatgpt.com/g/g-oF7e29CZP-gary-vee-marketing-advisor - community-created
Gary VEE AI on yeschat.ai - third-party, unofficial
research_notes.garys_ai_philosophy: Gary Vaynerchuk views AI as transformative ('AI is going to be like oxygen') but emphasizes human creativity and authenticity as the differentiator. He advocates a 'barbell strategy' - extreme technology on one end, 1950s-style personal relationships on the other. He actively uses AI tools like ChatGPT for research and strategy but has chosen not to launch a personal AI product. His strategic focus for 2025-2026 is live social shopping, TikTok live streaming, and Substack long-form content rather than AI chatbot products.
